distillationMethod.pipeline: RIA-TV++ adapted to a single requested skill output
distillationMethod.stage0: Adler structural, interpretive, critical, and application reading recorded in BOOK_OVERVIEW.md
distillationMethod.stage1: Candidate frameworks, principles, cases, counterexamples, and glossary extracted into candidates/
distillationMethod.stage1_5: Triple verification applied: cross-source support, predictive use, and distinctiveness; rejected units recorded in rejected/
distillationMethod.stage2: RIA++ skill construction with Reading, Interpretation, Past Application, Future Trigger, Execution, and Boundary sections
distillationMethod.stage3: Zettelkasten-style index and related-skill links recorded in INDEX.md and SKILL.md
distillationMethod.stage4: Pressure tests encoded in test-prompts.json with should_trigger, should_not_trigger, and edge_cases

keyConcepts: ontology as categories for a language and purpose
lexicon as bridge from language to knowledge
word sense versus concept versus object
causal influence as directed acyclic graph

notes: Markdown chapter files are reading wrappers; local HTML originals were used where full text was necessary.
One consolidated skill was produced because the task specified one output directory and one required frontmatter name.
Runtime execution is self-contained in SKILL.md; source files are retained as trace evidence, not required operating context.

runtimeDependencyPolicy: Closed skill: execute from SKILL.md; use references/source-notes.md only as local optional provenance; do not require external source folders, webpages, original books, source reports, machine-local paths, or cross-skill files.

finalCheck.notes: Audit/test markers normalized with suite-wide closure checks; SKILL.md remains runtime self-contained.
